basic_details.job_title: DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 12 Laboratory Technicians, TB Health Visitor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Laboratory Technicians, TB Health Visitor and DRTB Counselor
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Kanchipuram (DHS Kanchipuram) Laboratory Technicians, TB Health Visitor and DRTB Counselor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DHS Kanchipuram. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Kanchipuram Laboratory Technicians, TB Health Visitor and DRTB Counselor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology, Graduate in science or Twelfth (10+2) in science with experience as MPHW/LHV/ANM/Health worker, Graduate Degree in Social Work /Sociology/ Psychology
qualification.details: Laboratory Technicians: Essential: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Preferential: One year experience in NTEP or Sputum smear microscopy; Candidates with higher qualification (for example Graduates) shall be Preferred. TB Health Visitor (TB HV): Essential: Graduate in science or Twelfth (10+2) in science and experience of working as in MPHW/ LHV/ ANM/ Health worker/Certificate or higher course in health education / counselling; Certificate course in Computer Operations (minimum two months). DRTB Counselor: Essential: Graduate Degree in Social Work /Sociology/ Psychology. Preferential: Master's degree / PG Diploma in social work /sociology /psychology; Experience in NTEP or worked as counsellor; Basic knowledge of computers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kanchipuram.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.district_health_society_kanchipuram_dhs_: Laboratory Technicians, TB Health Visitor and DRTB Counselor

content_sections.heading: DHS Kanchipuram Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHS Kanchipuram Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Laboratory Technicians: Essential: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Preferential: One year experience in NTEP or Sputum smear microscopy; Candidates with higher qualification (for example Graduates) shall be Preferred. TB Health Visitor (TB HV): Essential: Graduate in science or Twelfth (10+2) in science and experience of working as in MPHW/ LHV/ ANM/ Health worker/Certificate or higher course in health education / counselling; Certificate course in Computer Operations (minimum two months). DRTB Counselor: Essential: Graduate Degree in Social Work /Sociology/ Psychology. Preferential: Master's degree / PG Diploma in social work /sociology /psychology; Experience in NTEP or worked as counsellor; Basic knowledge of computers.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Kanchipuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kanchipuram.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the District Health Society Kanchipuram recruitment is 06th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Laboratory Technicians?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the post of Laboratory Technicians in the District Health Society Kanchipuram recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for TB Health Visitor?
faq.answer: For the TB Health Visitor post, candidates need to be a Graduate in science or have passed Twelfth (10+2) in science with relevant experience and a computer course.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by the District Health Society Kanchipuram.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for DRTB Counselor?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the DRTB Counselor position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for DHS Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the District Health Society Kanchipuram recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the advertised posts in the District Health Society Kanchipuram recruitment will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for DHS Kanchipuram?
faq.answer: The official website for District Health Society Kanchipuram is kanchipuram.nic.in, where you can find more details and download the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the posts?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies in this recruitment?
faq.answer: In total, there are 12 vacancies announced by the District Health Society Kanchipuram for various posts including Laboratory Technicians, TB Health Visitor, and DRTB Counselor.
